question: Why is time management considered a crucial life skill?
correct_answer: It improves personal and social interactions.
wrong_answers_pool: It helps you win arguments always.
It allows you to ignore others.
It means you don't need friends.
It means you never have to work hard.
It only matters when playing sports.
explanation: time management plays a significant role in fostering better relationships and personal growth.
